description: Sector-specific screening controls for UK technology services, SaaS/platform providers, online services, data protection, cyber security, processor/controller obligations, online safety, and service-governance documentation.

metadata.scope: UK sector overlay controls for Technology Sector Compliance Overlay. Intended to be used with uk_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official UK legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.
limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current UK laws, regulations, regulator notices, codes and guidance before production reliance.
UK rules may differ between England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland; human reviewers must verify territorial applicability.

rules.title: UK GDPR controller/processor role evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for controller, processor, joint controller, processing instructions, DPA, Article 28, or data-processing agreement evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.

rules.title: Data-security technical and organisational measures are documented
rules.summary: Checks for technical and organisational measures, access control, encryption, logging, vulnerability management, or incident response evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.
source_basis: ICO A guide to data security

rules.title: Cyber Essentials-aligned controls are evidenced
rules.summary: Checks for firewall, secure configuration, security updates, user access control, malware protection, or Cyber Essentials evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.

rules.title: Online Safety Act duties are documented where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for user-to-user service, search service, risk assessment, moderation, reporting, or children safety evidence.

rules.title: Outsourcing, subprocessor, or vendor controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for subprocessors, vendor due diligence, outsourcing, service levels, audit rights, or supply-chain security evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
